# Supplemental material

```{=latex}
\begin{landscape}
\thispagestyle{empty}
\vspace*{0cm}

\begin{center}
\noindent\hspace*{-5cm}%
\includegraphics[
width=1.4\linewidth,
height=1.5\textheight,
keepaspectratio,
trim=0cm 12cm 0cm 0cm,
clip
]{images/supplementary_table_1_sex_clusters_final.pdf}
\end{center}

\vfill
\noindent\rule{\linewidth}{0.4pt}\\[-0.2cm]
{\footnotesize Mikkel Errboe Steentoft \textbar\ 201609886 \hfill Page \thepage\ of 64}
\end{landscape}
```

```{=latex}
\vspace*{0.5cm}
\noindent\hspace*{-1.5cm}%
\includegraphics[
width=1.15\textwidth,
keepaspectratio,
trim=0cm 5cm 0cm 1cm,
]{images/supplementary_table_2_ogtt_measures_final.pdf}
\par
```

```{=latex}
\newpage
\vspace*{-0.9cm}
\noindent\hspace*{-1.6cm}%
\includegraphics[width=1.15\textwidth]{images/supplementary_table_3_original_values_final.pdf}
\par
```

```{=latex}
\begin{landscape}
\thispagestyle{empty}
\vspace*{-0.8cm}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[
  width=1.10\linewidth,
  height=0.80\textheight,
  keepaspectratio
]{images/supplementary_figure_1_forest_plot_final.pdf}
\end{center}

\vfill
\noindent\rule{\linewidth}{0.4pt}\\[-0.2cm]
{\footnotesize Mikkel Errboe Steentoft \textbar\ 201609886 \hfill Page \thepage\ of 64}
\end{landscape}
```
